improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners, traders, and professionals. Powered by Claude. Try free today.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value prop and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the link is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. Including the pricing anchor (US$2/day) sets expectations and filters for qualified traffic.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace to streamline your operations. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces Gideon by name and clarifies its purpose, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the risk-free trial offer. 'No card required' reduces friction and increases trial conversions. Copy stays factual and within stated context.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual plans saving you 30 percent. As a member, you unlock unlimited queries, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel—what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free trial to paid membership and reinforcing the low entry price and value, it reduces uncertainty and builds trust, helping move prospects toward signup.
